special_mechanics.name: Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Player character Benjamin can jump as part of action-adventure exploration mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Tool-based Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Weapons and tools used outside of battle for exploration: axe for chopping trees, bombs for detonating sealed doorways, grappling hook for crossing gaps

special_mechanics.name: Platforming
special_mechanics.description: Puzzle-based platforming elements, such as moving ice pillars to use as platforms across multiple levels (Falls Basin example)

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Sources document game mechanics and features at high level but do not provide specific physics parameters, frame data, or movement values. Movement physics are not a primary focus of this entry-level RPG design.
